verification_notes.note: Batch 13 directly revalidated the official BMW 07/2011 valid-from-09/2011 F20 petrol technical-data PDF. That checked official source publishes only 116i and 118i launch-state rows and provides no 114i row in either manual or automatic form, so this represented 114i MT6 entry remains an invalid advisory placeholder rather than a supported exact 2011 production configuration.

verification_notes.note: Batch 13 directly revalidated the official BMW 07/2011 valid-from-09/2011 F20 petrol technical-data PDF. That checked official source publishes only 116i and 118i launch-state rows and provides no 120i row in either manual or automatic form, so this represented 120i ZF8HP entry remains an invalid advisory placeholder rather than a supported exact 2011 production configuration.

unresolved.reason: The checked official BMW 09/2011 petrol launch sheet contains only 116i and 118i, so this represented 120i row is contradicted for the exact 2011 launch-state under its current id.
